channel.title: Note on Chasing's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Note on Chasing's blog

item.title: Mathematic Fomulars
item.description: Mathematic Fomulars The mathematical typesetting is based on LaTeX, so if you need to search for the way to make a particular symbol, include latex in your search. But note: Not all LaTeX macros are available without using additional packages, and those packages likely will only work if you are creating a PDF. On the plus side, if you are working in PDF, you can use additional packages that give much better control and/or easier syntax.

item.title: Operating System
item.description: 1. Overview 什么是操作系统？ 硬件角度： 管理硬件：将复杂的，具备不同功能的硬件资源纳入统一管理。 对硬件进行抽象：抽象成不依赖具体硬件特性的资源。 将有限
